commit.message:
fix: cleanup_deleted_sources output 已刪但 DB 未刪時記錄 warning

問題：delete_task() 回傳 False 時（任務在查詢後被 process_daemon 搶走），
若 output 已成功刪除，磁碟與 DB 狀態暫時不一致，但程式碼靜默無聲，
操作者無法從 log 判斷這是預期行為還是 bug。

修正：在 delete_task() 回傳 False 的 else 分支加上 warning log，
說明任務已被 process_daemon 接管、output 將於下一個 cycle 重新清理。

新增測試：test_output_deleted_but_task_claimed_logs_warning
- 驗證 output file 確實已被刪除
- 驗證 warning log 包含 'claimed by process daemon'
- deleted 回傳 0（task 未計入，因為 DB 記錄保留）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: fix prototype chain IC regression + phi copy elimination

- Remove broken proto_handle validation from all 3 proto IC hit paths.
  The validation compared DIRECT prototype shape against the shape of
  the object where the property was found (N levels up). For chains
  with depth > 1, these never matched, causing every IC hit to fail
  and fall through to the slow path (145x regression).
  The receiver shape + global epoch check is sufficient.

- Partition phi copy operations into safe (direct MOV) and conflicting
  (push/pop via stack). Safe entries skip MOV when src==dst register.
  Eliminates redundant stack round-trips at loop back-edges.

Chore: upgrade ts (#122)

* chore: upgrade TypeScript to v6

- Bump typescript dependency from ^5.7.3 to ^6.0.0
- Remove deprecated downlevelIteration option (only applied to ES5 target, which is deprecated in TS6)
- Replace deprecated moduleResolution 'node' (node10) with 'bundler' in all CJS tsconfigs
- Add skipLibCheck to tsconfig.base.json to resolve @types/node URLPattern conflict with TS6 DOM lib

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: avoid skipLibCheck by removing dom lib and adding @types/node to types

The previous commit added skipLibCheck to work around a type conflict
between TypeScript 6's DOM lib URLPattern declaration and @types/node@24's
conflicting declaration in its url module's global augmentation.

The proper fix: this is a Node.js library that doesn't need the browser
DOM lib. Removing 'dom' and 'esnext.disposable' from lib eliminates the
conflict at its source since URLPattern is then declared only once
(by @types/node). Adding 'node' to the types array ensures @types/node's
web platform globals (AbortSignal, EventTarget, WebSocket, setTimeout, etc.)
are available, which are needed by vitest and tinybench during type checking.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add intake consent packet and supplemental ref data (#95)

* Add intake consent packet and supplemental ref data

Introduce canonical intake consent packet support and land an asset-backed supplemental reference-data pipeline with provenance. Key changes: prefer IntakeConsentPacket over legacy consents JSON (DTOs, ResolveConsentJson, TryParseConsentPacket, endpoint normalization); expand IntakeStructuredData to include comorbidities, assistive devices, living situations and house-layout options and normalize them; add an embedded IntakeSupplementalReferenceData.json and loader, asset models, and ReferenceDataProvenance; wire provenance into IntakeReferenceDataCatalogService and expose supplemental option lookups; add workspace placeholders (ExerciseRows, GeneralInterventions) and logic to resolve canonical labels; update project to embed the supplemental JSON and add tests covering normalization and provenance. Files touched include DTOs, endpoints, structured-data models/normalization, reference-data services, infrastructure loaders/assets, workspace contracts/service, and tests.

* Update src/PTDoc.Infrastructure/ReferenceData/EmbeddedJsonResourceLoader.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Improve embedded JSON resource loading

Resolve the application assembly via IIntakeReferenceDataCatalogService instead of typeof(T) and introduce TryOpenResourceStream. The new helper first attempts a direct GetManifestResourceStream, then falls back to matching resource names by filename suffix (using the last two dotted segments) to handle differently prefixed embedded resource names. Also added the necessary using for PTDoc.Application.ReferenceData.
